# Boxoban Levels

EnvPool uses a pinned Boxoban shard for native Jumanji Sokoban tests and
fallback runtime data.

- Upstream dataset: https://github.com/google-deepmind/boxoban-levels
- Hugging Face mirror: https://huggingface.co/InstaDeepAI/boxoban-levels
- Pinned mirror revision: `41fca526e00322682a7cfb0478a76df5643d69b1`
- File used here: `unfiltered-test.npy`
- SHA256: `7076911c60a41d4aa700982e474f962e0224dabf3809104f2d6699eb5774657b`

The Boxoban levels are licensed under Apache-2.0. If this shard is replaced or
expanded, keep the upstream license and citation information with the packaged
data.
